div.h2: Self-contained unit of data with complete audit trail
div.p: • id: NanoId • payload: T • actor: ActorEntry[string] • temporal: Bitemporal • trigger: Trigger • reason: string • context: Context • version: int • tags: map[string]string • references: []Reference[string] • causes: []Cause[string]

div.h2: Ordered chain of actors from original to current

div.p: • kind: ActorKind • id: Id[T] • name: string
• validFrom: Timestamp • validUntil: Timestamp • recorded: Timestamp • correction: bool
• environment: string • session: string • request: string • source: string • tags: map[string]string
• id: T • relation: string • version: int • tags: map[string]string
• id: NanoId • kind: string • effect: string • trace: []NanoId

div.h2: URL-safe unique identifier (21 chars, 126 bits entropy)
Branded, strongly-typed ID prevents mixing entity IDs

div.p: Unbranded ID alias for backwards compatibility
• value: string • minLen: int • maxLen: int
Monetary amount in smallest currency unit (int64)
• en_US, en_GB • de_DE, fr_FR • es_ES, it_IT • ja_JP, zh_CN
• Manual • Scheduled • Webhook • Import • Migration • System • Correction
ISO 4217 currency handling • currency.Amount • currency.Formatter • currency.Locale
